Class TourSummary

java.lang.Object
TourSummary
public class TourSummary extends Object
TourSummary records and summarises the safari tour data. It tracks locations visited, animals sighted, injuries, deaths, and calculates an overall tour success rating.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TourSummary(int originalTourists)
    Constructor initializes the tour summary with the original tourist count.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addAnimalSighted(Animal animal)
    Records a sighted animal and adds its species name if not already recorded.
    void
    addKilledAnimal(Animal animal)
    Adds a killed animal to the list if it is not null.
    void
    addLocationVisited(Location location)
    Marks the location as visited, increments the locations visited counter, and adds its animal count to the total.
    double
    calculateRating()
    Calculates and returns the tour success rating as a percentage.
    int
    countKilledSpecies(Species species)
    Counts the number of killed animals belonging to the specified species.
    int
    getDeaths()
    Accessor method to return the number of tourist deaths.
    int
    getLocationsVisited()
    Accessor method to return the number of locations visited.
    int
    getMajorInjuries()
    Accessor method to return the number of major injuries.
    int
    getMinorInjuries()
    Accessor method to return the number of minor injuries.
    void
    recordTouristOutcome(Tourist tourist)
    Records the outcome of a tourist by reading their injury and alive status directly from the Tourist object.
    String
    toString()
    ToString method to return a formatted summary of the tour statistics, including injuries, deaths, species sighted, animals killed, and the success rating.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • TourSummary

      public TourSummary(int originalTourists)
      Constructor initializes the tour summary with the original tourist count. All other statistics are set to zero and lists are initialized as empty.
      Parameters:
      originalTourists - the number of tourists at the start of the tour as an int.

  • Method Details

    • addAnimalSighted

      public void addAnimalSighted(Animal animal)
      Records a sighted animal and adds its species name if not already recorded.
      Parameters:
      animal - the Animal that was sighted.

    • addLocationVisited

      public void addLocationVisited(Location location)
      Marks the location as visited, increments the locations visited counter, and adds its animal count to the total.
      Parameters:
      location - the Location that was visited.

    • recordTouristOutcome

      public void recordTouristOutcome(Tourist tourist)
      Records the outcome of a tourist by reading their injury and alive status directly from the Tourist object. Increments minor injuries, major injuries, or deaths accordingly.
      Parameters:
      tourist - the Tourist whose outcome is to be recorded.

    • addKilledAnimal

      public void addKilledAnimal(Animal animal)
      Adds a killed animal to the list if it is not null.
      Parameters:
      animal - the Animal that was killed.

    • getDeaths

      public int getDeaths()
      Accessor method to return the number of tourist deaths.
      Returns:
      the death count as an int.

    • getLocationsVisited

      public int getLocationsVisited()
      Accessor method to return the number of locations visited.
      Returns:
      the locations visited count as an int.

    • getMajorInjuries

      public int getMajorInjuries()
      Accessor method to return the number of major injuries.
      Returns:
      the major injury count as an int.

    • getMinorInjuries

      public int getMinorInjuries()
      Accessor method to return the number of minor injuries.
      Returns:
      the minor injury count as an int.

    • calculateRating

      public double calculateRating()
      Calculates and returns the tour success rating as a percentage. Returns 0.0 if any tourist died, no animals were present, or no tourists participated.
      Returns:
      the tour success rating as a double between 0.0 and 100.0.

    • countKilledSpecies

      public int countKilledSpecies(Species species)
      Counts the number of killed animals belonging to the specified species.
      Parameters:
      species - the Species to count as killed.
      Returns:
      the count of killed animals of that species as an int.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      ToString method to return a formatted summary of the tour statistics, including injuries, deaths, species sighted, animals killed, and the success rating.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a String containing the full tour summary.
